decks.description: Focuses on efficient creatures with anthem effects and removal spells, leveraging Basri Ket as a planeswalker finisher.
A creature-focused deck featuring unicorns with instant-speed tricks for protection and tactical advantage, playing medium-sized creatures enhanced by instants and enchantments.
Features classic flying angels with removal and artifact support. The deck plays a mix of efficient creatures and disruption spells.
Focuses on powerful angel flyers with key hatebear effects like Linvala. The deck combines evasive creatures with utility and removal.
Aggressive small creatures with strong enablers; focuses on dogs synergies with removal and board control spells.
Aggressive small creatures with strong enablers; focuses on dogs synergies with removal and board control spells.
Creature-focused enchantment deck that uses enchantments to boost small creatures and generate value from the enchantment triggers.
Enchantment-heavy deck that puts auras on creatures to generate incremental value and board presence through enchantment synergies.
A life gain focused deck with healing spells and creatures that reward gaining life, creating a defensive yet proactive strategy.
A life gain and healing focused deck with removal spells and creatures that synergize with gaining life to control the game.
A life gain engine deck with creatures and enchantments that double life gain effects, creating exponential value over time.
A life gain defensive deck with evasive creatures and healing spells that build up tokens and anthem effects for late game advantage.
A bird-themed aggressive deck with small flying creatures and combat tricks to pump up your flyers for damage.
A bird-focused deck with instant-speed tricks and utility spells to support flying creatures in combat.
A flying-focused deck with protective instants and an angel threat to dominate the air.
An archon-heavy flying deck with defensive creatures and removal spells to control the battlefield.
Creature-focused deck with anthem effects that boost creatures' power and toughness, alongside combat tricks and anthem-based synergies.
Creature-heavy deck with promotion effects and combat tricks that enhance creatures and generate tokens.
Creature-heavy deck with a +1/+1 counter theme featuring Mikaeus and anthem effects to pump creatures.
Creature-heavy deck with double-strike effects and token generation that create a wide board of creatures.
Small efficient creatures with token generation and combat pump spells, focused on board presence and mass attack.
Aggressive small creatures with anthem effects and removal, building a wide board and buffing all creatures.
Lean creature-based deck with anthem buffs and token generation, emphasizing a wide attack with global power bonuses.
Versatile small creatures with card advantage and token generation, using Mentor of the Meek and Lena to build a strong board position.
Control-heavy deck with Teferi's card draw engines and protective instants to control the game while generating value through draw effects.

This deck focuses on milling opponents' libraries through creatures and spells that force card discard from libraries. It features enablers like Bruvac the Grandiloquent that synergize with mill effects.
A creature-focused pirate deck with evasion and card draw synergies. Coastal Piracy rewards you for attacking with creatures, while Chart a Course provides additional draw.
A spell-heavy pirate deck that focuses on enchantment auras and card draw. Curious Obsession enables evasive creatures while maintaining tempo.
Evasive spirit creatures with instant-speed tricks for tempo and control. Features flying spirits with flicker effects and removal spells to disrupt opponents.
Flying spirit creatures backed by counterspells and protective instants. A controlling tempo deck with access to card draw and bounce effects.
A creature-focused deck featuring large water elementals and merfolk with some utility enchantments and instant removal.
A sea creature deck with evasive creatures and board control spells like Whelming Wave to manage the battlefield.
Flying-focused deck with evasive creatures and instant-speed answers to control the air.
Flying creatures with instant-speed tricks and card draw to dominate the skies.
Flying creatures with strong evasion and control spells to win through the air.
Evasive flying creatures with cheap instant-speed tricks and creature protection.
An artifact-focused deck with creatures that interact with artifacts and spells, using artifact mana sources and tutoring effects to build advantage.
An artifact-focused deck with creatures that interact with artifacts and spells, using artifact mana sources and tutoring effects to build advantage.
An artifact-heavy deck with creatures that leverage artifacts for card draw and synergy, featuring multiple artifact synergies and strong evasive creatures.
An artifact-focused deck with creature tokens and artifact synergies, featuring creatures that create tokens and interact with the artifact theme.
Library-focused deck that draws cards and controls the board through enchantment auras and artifact creatures that interact with the stack.
Library-focused deck that draws cards through creature interactions and enchantment auras while using an artifact library and control elements.
Spell-heavy library deck featuring flying creatures and card draw engines that trigger on card selection and enchantment-based control.
Card-selection and draw-focused deck with flying creatures and instant-speed library interactions that punish opponents for not paying mana.
A spell-focused deck with wizard creatures that synergize with instant and sorcery spells, generating tokens and effects.
A wizard-themed spell-heavy deck that generates value through instant and sorcery interactions while controlling the board.
A spell-based control deck leveraging wizard creatures to amplify instant and sorcery effects with board interaction.
A control-oriented wizard deck with spells and creatures that bounce and protect, enabling long-term board advantage.
A creature-focused deck built around Liliana with her devoted followers, supported by graveyard interaction and reanimation effects to recur resources and threats.
A creature-focused deck with Phyrexian creatures and cards that exploit damage and sacrifice effects. The deck uses a mix of evasive creatures and removal spells to control the board.
Creature-focused discard deck that rewards opponents for discarding cards with creatures like Tinybones and Wight of Precinct Six, featuring discard effects from Burglar Rat and Mind Rot.
Creature-focused discard deck that uses forced discard effects to trigger abilities on creatures that benefit from opponent discard, with heavy creature count and minimal sorcery support.
A rogue-focused deck with evasive creatures and targeted removal, using card draw and artifact synergies to enable efficient spellcasting.
A graveyard-synergy rogue deck featuring creatures that interact with the graveyard while maintaining efficient removal and evasion elements.
A witch-focused deck built around cauldron artifacts and witch creatures that sacrifice and generate value through small creatures and removal spells.
A witch-themed sacrifice deck that uses disposable creatures and cauldron effects alongside removal and card draw to control the board.
Minions-themed deck with cheap creatures and sacrifice effects, using removal and card draw from death triggers.
Minions-themed deck featuring small creatures with sacrifice and removal synergies, utilizing creature death effects.
Minions-themed deck with small creatures and removal spells, featuring sacrifice synergies and extra instant-speed removal.
Minions-themed deck featuring small creatures and sacrifice outlets, with creature-based removal and targeted destruction.
Graveyard-focused deck that fills the graveyard with creatures and reanimates them from the graveyard using spells like Reanimate and Rise Again.
Graveyard-based deck that mills creatures into the graveyard and recasts them using multiple reanimation spells like Reanimate, Rise Again, and Macabre Waltz.
Self-mill graveyard deck with recursive reanimation threats and Zombie Infestation for token generation while filling the graveyard.
Powerful reanimation deck that brings multiple creatures back from the graveyard with spells like Rise of the Dark Realms and Soul Salvage for explosive finishes.
A creature-heavy zombie deck focused on small creatures and removal. Includes recursion-themed creatures that synergize with sacrifice outlets.
A zombie-focused deck with creatures that generate value and board control effects. Features creatures with triggered abilities and mass creature removal.
A zombie-heavy deck with strong creature synergies and token generation. Features Ogre Slumlord for creating tokens and a board wipe spell.
A zombie-focused deck with mana ramp and recursion. Features Black Market for explosive mana and creatures with strong death/sacrifice synergies.
A vampire-focused deck with lifegain and drain effects, using small evasive creatures paired with cards that gain life when damage is dealt to opponents.

cards.title: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose

decks.description: A vampire-focused deck with lifegain and drain effects, using a mix of evasive creatures and lords to build card advantage and life totals.

cards.title: Vito, Thorn of the Dusk Rose

decks.description: A vampire-focused deck that uses blood/drain synergies to gain life while dealing damage, featuring vampire lords and life-link creatures.
A vampire-focused deck with creatures that generate multiple synergies, featuring both lords and drain effects to build card advantage and control the board.
A spell-heavy deck focused on fire and pyromancer effects, with creatures that synergize with instants and sorceries to deal damage.
A creature and spell-heavy deck focused on dealing damage with Elementals and burn spells, featuring volcanic effects like Magmaquake and Volcanic Fallout for area damage.
Big flying threats with dragon synergy and card draw. This deck focuses on evasive creatures that deal damage from the air while generating value with dragon-themed spells.
Dragon-heavy aggro deck with token generation and powerful lord effects. This deck uses creatures that create additional threats while powering up other dragons through synergistic abilities.
Lightning-focused deck with creatures that synergize with lightning spells and direct damage effects.
Lightning-themed creatures with powerful instant-speed spells and evasion through recurring lightning effects.
A focused minotaur tribal deck with lord effects and aggressive creatures designed to quickly overpower opponents.
A minotaur-focused tribal deck with extra burn and disruption to complement an aggressive creature strategy.
A devil-focused aggro deck with evasive creatures and sacrifice synergies. Cards like Havoc Jester and Pitchburn Devils deal damage through multiple damage engines.
A devil-themed aggressive deck with multiple tokens and damage-dealing creatures. Features doubled Torch Fiends and direct damage from sacrifice outlets.
A devil deck built around damage triggers and temporary control effects. Brash Taunter and Lightning-Core Excavator provide additional damage-dealing options alongside devil creatures.
A devil-focused burn deck with creatures that trigger on damage and sacrifice effects. Sin Prodder and Hellrider add reach and evasion to the aggressive strategy.
Creature-focused goblin deck that generates tokens and deals damage through small efficient units with some burn spells and artifact synergy.
Token-generating goblin swarm deck with efficient creatures and burn spells to overwhelm opponents quickly.
Creature-heavy goblin swarm focused on playing many small goblins with lords and combat tricks to attack through.
Goblin token generator led by Krenko with sorceries that create additional tokens and sacrifice outlets for damage.
Aggressive deck focused on big creatures that deal direct damage through combat and sacrifice effects with cards like Fling.
Aggressive deck featuring red creatures and instant removal, with equipment support to enhance combat prowess.
Creature-heavy aggressive deck with large red creatures that trigger damage effects when they deal combat damage or enter the battlefield.
Big red creatures deck that uses enchantments to generate extra value through damage triggers and combat effects.
Spell-heavy deck focused on instant effects with creatures that benefit from casting spells, generating tokens and dealing damage through a fast spell-focused strategy.
Spell-heavy deck with creatures that trigger off instant and sorcery casts, combining efficient removal spells with token generation and damage effects.
Spell-heavy deck with multiple creatures that synergize with instant and sorcery casting, combining efficient removal and token generation with spell-copying effects.
Spell-heavy deck focused on casting multiple sorceries and instants to trigger creatures that benefit from spellcasting, with an emphasis on efficient removal and card advantage.
Big creatures with Garruk planeswalker support. The deck focuses on large beasts and hunting instants to draw cards and protect creatures while Garruk, Unleashed builds a board of powerful creatures.
A defensive deck focused on walls and other creatures that benefit from high toughness. Uses Assault Formation to make these creatures deal combat damage despite their low power.
A creature-focused deck featuring green cats that attack and interact with the board through combat tricks and removal spells.
A cat-themed deck featuring green creatures with enchantment synergies that trigger predatory abilities and card draw effects.
Small to medium elves with mana generation and a game-ending finisher in Craterhoof Behemoth.
Elf-focused deck with creature synergies and token generation to build a strong board presence.
Ramp-focused deck that uses creatures to unlock land potential and enchantments to animate lands, providing both mana acceleration and board presence.
Land-focused ramp deck with powerful creatures that reward land play and enchantments that create tokens whenever lands enter the battlefield.
Big aggressive dinosaurs with ramp and removal spells to power out large creatures quickly.
Midrange dinosaurs with mana acceleration and enchantment-based synergies to establish a strong board presence.
Heavy hitter dinosaurs with pump spells and resource generation for a powerful aggressive strategy.
Dinosaur creatures focused on landfall synergies and enchantment ramp for sustained threats.
Focused on putting +1/+1 counters on creatures through Fertilid, Hornbeetle, and other counter synergies, with instants and sorceries that amplify the growth potential.
Centered on +1/+1 counter synergies with creatures that benefit from counters, using Branching Evolution to double counter effects.
A +1/+1 counter deck featuring creatures that synergize with counters and multiple instant options to protect and enhance creatures.
A +1/+1 counter focused deck with creatures that grow exponentially, enhanced by Branching Evolution and various instant support spells.
A creature-focused deck with efficient predators and fight effects to take down opponents' creatures through combat and removal.
Similar to Predatory 1, featuring nimble creatures with fight effects and targeted removal to control the board through predatory actions.
A creature-heavy predatory deck featuring bigger threats like Thragtusk alongside fight spells and efficient hunters to eliminate opposing creatures.
A creature-based predatory deck with three instants for interaction, featuring efficient hunters and sacrifice synergy with Momentous Fall.
Green creature-based deck featuring treefolk and card-draw synergy with Primordial Sage enabling card advantage from casting creatures.
Treefolk-focused deck with creature-based removal and card advantage through Primordial Sage triggers when creatures enter the battlefield.
Treefolk deck with card advantage through Primordial Sage and Jolrael providing tokens for green creature strategies.
Treefolk creature deck with card advantage from Soul of the Harvest and Verdant Embrace, providing sustained value from creature plays.
A multicolor deck with diverse creatures that take advantage of all five colors, supported by mana fixing artifacts and lands to ensure consistent color production.
